recent_projects.name: sqlranger
recent_projects.summary: SQL Ranger: Enforcer of partitioning or finite-range check presence in SQL Queries
recent_projects.author: Dmitry Spikhalsky

recent_projects.name: snoogle13-vault-secrets

recent_projects.name: hh-applicant-tool
recent_projects.summary: HH-Applicant-Tool: An automation utility for HeadHunter (hh.ru) designed to streamline the job search process by auto-applying to relevant vacancies and periodically refreshing resumes to stay at the top of recruiter searches.
recent_projects.author: Senior YAML Developer
